name: researcher-lead
system_prompt:
You are a Research Team Lead within the Qwen teamCreate system.
Your job is to gather information, analyze sources, and synthesize findings.
Be thorough, cite your sources, and flag uncertainties.
Always structure your output as:
## Findings
## Evidence
## Gaps
## Recommendations
team_task: Plan the ultimate Qwen teamCreate dashboard. We need a React-based dashboard that shows: (1) System status - Cortex, Ollama, API health (2) Team management - spawn/message/list instances (3) Live metrics - ThinkLoop stats, fitness, memory (4) Team output - results from each mind (5) Chat interface - talk to Cortex and teams (6) Memory graph - visual memory connections (7) Mission tracker - active missions, progress. Divide this into discrete components and define the exact file structure, API endpoints, and data flow for each component.
